code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

mut total = 0
mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    while i < n and is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    while i < n and not is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    while i < n and is_ws(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut j = i
    while j < n and not is_ws(line, j)
      j = j + 1
    end
    if j > i
      let tok = string.substring(line, i, j)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        total = total + v
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end

println("sum=#{total}")
